title: Transformative dance competition launched to inspire youth
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Reach for the Stars is an...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Reach for the Stars is an inclusive dance competition that aims to inspire upcoming South African dancers across a multitude of styles, empower the youth to reach for the stars, and ultimately elevate their profile on the national and international dance stage. This premier dance event is a collaboration between the Institute for Applied Alchemy (IAA) which supports catalysts for positive change, and the event Founder, Desiree Angus, a renowned dancer, choreographer, and stagecraft expert.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Reach for the Stars is an inclusive dance competition that aims to inspire upcoming South African dancers across a multitude of styles, empower the youth to reach for the stars, and ultimately elevate their profile on the national and international dance stage. This premier dance event is a collaboration between the Institute for Applied Alchemy (IAA) which supports catalysts for positive change, and the event Founder, Desiree Angus, a renowned dancer, choreographer, and stagecraft expert."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"South Africans aged 8 to 35 years who are looking for a platform to showcase their incredible dance talent are urged to enter the first-ever Reach for the Stars competition, taking place in the Western Cape and Central Karoo this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This premier dancing competition aims to celebrate the country’s diverse dance talents, with the deadline for video submissions open from now until 11 April 2025.","html":"This premier dancing competition aims to celebrate the country’s diverse dance talents, with the deadline for video submissions open from now until 11 April 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From contemporary and hip-hop to jazz and traditional, Reach for the Stars entrants can enter the competition using any dance style they are skilled in or have been trained in, across the various age groups, in solo and group formats. The competition starts with video submissions and qualifiers hosted in the Western Cape and Central Karoo, followed by a 2-day finale in October. The prize winner will walk away with R20 000 in cash, and the inaugural Reach for the Stars title.","html":"From contemporary and hip-hop to jazz and traditional, Reach for the Stars entrants can enter the competition using any dance style they are skilled in or have been trained in, across the various age groups, in solo and group formats. The competition starts with video submissions and qualifiers hosted in the Western Cape and Central Karoo, followed by a 2-day finale in October. The prize winner will walk away with R20 000 in cash, and the inaugural Reach for the Stars title."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"At Reach for the Stars, we believe in pushing artistic boundaries and nurturing talent to shine on both local and international stages,\" says Desiree Angus. “For over five decades, my passion has been to inspire dancers to grow, express, and excel. Seeing them flourish is the greatest reward, and this platform is dedicated to elevating their artistry beyond limits.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chantel Oppelt, Executive Director of IAA noted, “The transformative nature of Reach for the Stars dance competition allows the dancer to transcend and silence the external voices of limitation and transmute them, through their art, into the magnitude and magic of who they truly are.”","html":"Chantel Oppelt, Executive Director of IAA noted, “The transformative nature of Reach for the Stars dance competition allows the dancer to transcend and silence the external voices of limitation and transmute them, through their art, into the magnitude and magic of who they truly are.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"How the competition works","html":"How the competition works"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you’re interested in honing and showcasing your dance talent, no matter the dance style, then enter the Reach for the Stars competition!","html":"If you’re interested in honing and showcasing your dance talent, no matter the dance style, then enter the Reach for the Stars competition!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Part 1: Submission","html":"Part 1: Submission"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Submissions are open until 11 April, and dancers are called to submit videos no longer than 1 minute via the Reach for the Stars website: www.reachforthestars.africa. The competition’s organisers will also be visiting selected schools in the Western Cape and Central Karoo between February and March 2025 to showcase the Reach for the Stars competition. Reach for the Stars will have a Gala Event in April 2025 to announce the host school for the dance qualifiers.","html":"Submissions are open until 11 April, and dancers are called to submit videos no longer than 1 minute via the Reach for the Stars website: www.reachforthestars.africa. The competition’s organisers will also be visiting selected schools in the Western Cape and Central Karoo between February and March 2025 to showcase the Reach for the Stars competition. Reach for the Stars will have a Gala Event in April 2025 to announce the host school for the dance qualifiers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Part 2: Registration","html":"Part 2: Registration"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All approved submissions are then called on to register for the competition from 1 to 15 May 2025. This includes registration forms, indemnity forms, and competition registration payments.","html":"All approved submissions are then called on to register for the competition from 1 to 15 May 2025. This includes registration forms, indemnity forms, and competition registration payments."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Part 3: Qualifiers","html":"Part 3: Qualifiers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reach for the Stars will be hosting the qualifiers in the Western Cape and Central Karoo region between June and July 2025. The top 2 contestants from each age group and entry division will be selected by a panel of judges. There are also 2 ‘Shooting Star’ finalists who will be selected from across age groups and entry divisions.","html":"Reach for the Stars will be hosting the qualifiers in the Western Cape and Central Karoo region between June and July 2025. The top 2 contestants from each age group and entry division will be selected by a panel of judges. There are also 2 ‘Shooting Star’ finalists who will be selected from across age groups and entry divisions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Part 4: Finale","html":"Part 4: Finale"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In October 2025, Reach for the Stars will host the finale in Cape Town, where finalists will compete for exciting prizes. All semi-finalists from the various qualifiers will compete for 1st place and a R10 000 cash prize in each age group, in both solo and group divisions. All winners then go on to be finalists and, on Day 2, compete against one another for the overall title and R20 000 cash prize.","html":"In October 2025, Reach for the Stars will host the finale in Cape Town, where finalists will compete for exciting prizes. All semi-finalists from the various qualifiers will compete for 1st place and a R10 000 cash prize in each age group, in both solo and group divisions. All winners then go on to be finalists and, on Day 2, compete against one another for the overall title and R20 000 cash prize."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Age Groups","html":"Age Groups"},{"type":"list","items":["Junior: 8 to 12 years","Youth: 13 to 17 years","Senior: 18 to 35 years"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Entry Divisions","html":"Entry Divisions"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Solo, Duo, trio, quartet or groups of a minimum six performers.","html":"Solo, Duo, trio, quartet or groups of a minimum six performers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Benefits of Reach for the Stars","html":"Benefits of Reach for the Stars"},{"type":"list","items":["Dancers are encouraged to push their creative boundaries.","Dancers of every background and genre are given a space to perform.","The event fosters a supportive environment for growth.","This is a safe space for dancers to experiment, refine skills, and discover their unique ‘voice’.","The competition reignites the spark of creativity and self-expression."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to the cash prizes for winners, there is also a unique element as part of the prize. The competition will give rise to a ‘Reach for the Stars Access Fund’ which will financially benefit marginalised dancers by assisting them to gain access to further dancing training and exposure.","html":"In addition to the cash prizes for winners, there is also a unique element as part of the prize. The competition will give rise to a ‘Reach for the Stars Access Fund’ which will financially benefit marginalised dancers by assisting them to gain access to further dancing training and exposure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• For more about the Reach for the Stars competition or partnership opportunities, contact Chantel Oppelt at [email protected] or Desiree Angus at [email protected].","html":"• For more about the Reach for the Stars competition or partnership opportunities, contact Chantel Oppelt at [email protected] or Desiree Angus at [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]

images.alt: Transformative dance competition launched to inspire youth
